sourceRef: tip:What to document after every phone call with the VA

slides.headline: Keep Your Records
slides.body: Document every phone call with the VA to ensure future compliance.

slides.headline: Initial Documentation
slides.body: Immediately document the call time, date, and reason.

slides.headline: Key Information
slides.body: Note the student's name, COE status, and the issue discussed.

slides.headline: Follow-Up Actions
slides.body: Document any actions taken or decisions made.

slides.headline: Reference Materials
slides.body: Document any relevant VA regulations, forms, or other materials discussed.

slides.headline: Review and Update
slides.body: Periodically review and update the documentation as needed.
Start documenting your VA calls today for future compliance and peace of mind. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Ensure you're future-proof by documenting every phone call with the VA. Protect yourself from audits and maintain continuous compliance. Start today with our guide on what to document. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 5 of 5, which could benefit from a more engaging headline to match the others.
